meta.title: toki pona free kit - free translations and reading packs
meta.description: Free toki pona reading kits and translations: Reader's Kit, Chinese Wisdom kit, and Heart Sutra in toki pona.

hero.title: toki pona free kit + free translations
hero.subtitle: A focused landing page for free toki pona materials. Start with the Reader's Kit, continue with Chinese Wisdom, and read Heart Sutra in toki pona.

clarity.title: Small language, clear reading
clarity.text: toki pona helps reduce noise. The kits are designed for short sessions and repeatable reading practice.

free.title: Free entry points
free.text: All core items on this page are free resources: downloadable kits or translation pages.

practice.title: Built for practice
practice.text: Use these materials as a path: start, read, review, and return with stronger vocabulary and comprehension.

readers-kit.title: The Toki Pona Reader's Kit (Free)
readers-kit.author: ABVX
readers-kit.shortDesc: A practical free starter pack for reading and learning toki pona.
readers-kit.longDesc: Includes a guided entry to reading practice, compact references, and curated links for people starting with free toki pona resources.

chinese-wisdom.title: Chinese Wisdom in toki pona (Free Kit)
chinese-wisdom.author: ABVX
chinese-wisdom.shortDesc: A free reading kit for Chinese classics adapted to toki pona learning flow.
chinese-wisdom.longDesc: Focused on calm, short reading sessions: includes a free PDF layout and entry points for learners who want parallel text exploration.

heart-sutra.title: Heart Sutra in toki pona (Free Translation)
heart-sutra.author: ABVX
heart-sutra.shortDesc: A free toki pona translation track for Heart Sutra reading and study.
heart-sutra.longDesc: Prepared as a free translation page with download and read entry points. Links are placeholders and can be replaced when final files are published.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about language, access, and usage.

items.a: It is a free collection of toki pona learning and translation materials in one place.
Three core items: The Toki Pona Reader's Kit, Chinese Wisdom in toki pona, and Heart Sutra in toki pona.
Yes. This page is dedicated to free kits and free translation resources.

items.q: Do I need to know toki pona already?
items.a: No. The Reader's Kit is the recommended starting point for beginners.

items.q: Can I use these for self-study?
items.a: Yes. They are structured for short, repeatable reading sessions.

items.q: Why are some links marked TODO?
items.a: Some final target URLs are not published yet. The UI is ready and links can be replaced without redesign.

items.q: Do you support both EN and TP?
items.a: Yes. This landing supports English and toki pona at /en and /tp.
Use the GitHub repository link in the footer to report content or link issues.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.ipValue: Texts and visuals are owned by the publisher or used with permission.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.dataValue: This website does not collect personal data by default.
privacy.cookiesValue: No analytics cookies by default. Embedded third-party services may set cookies.
privacy.thirdPartyValue: Third-party links may have independent policies.
